final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cinematic still of a dragon and knight battle scene for a fantasy epic.

Style/medium: fantasy illustration, epic cinematic style, dynamic action painting
Composition: epic wide shot, dramatic low-angle perspective, knight charging toward massive dragon, sense of scale and motion
Subject: armored knight holding shield mid-charge, massive dragon rearing up with mouth open spewing flames, dynamic poses frozen in action
Scene/backdrop: burning castle in ruins, stormy sky with lightning bolts, smoke and embers filling the air, apocalyptic atmosphere
Lighting/mood: dramatic lightning flashes illuminating the scene, firelight from dragon breath casting warm orange glow, dark storm clouds, tense and heroic mood
Color palette: warm fire oranges and reds against cool storm grays and blues, lightning white as accent
Materials/textures: metallic armor with battle-worn scratches, dragon scales with rough texture, stone castle ruins, billowing smoke
Avoid: 8K stuffer aesthetic, plastic-looking dragon, static poses, watermark, generic fantasy art clichés
